rewritten_question_text:

Assuming \(|V_{IN}| \ll |V_{CC}|\) and \(|V_{REF}| \ll |V_{CC}|\), what condition makes \(V_{OUT} = 0\)?

rewritten_question_text: In the circuit shown in the figure, if the resistance \(R_1\) increases, how will the reading of ammeter \(A\) change?

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text:
In the figure, \( S_{PM}(t) \) and \( S_{FM}(t) \), as defined below, are the phase-modulated and frequency-modulated waveforms, respectively, corresponding to the message signal \( m(t) \):

\[
S_{PM}(t) = \cos(1000\pi t + K_p m(t))
\]
and
\[
S_{FM}(t) = \cos\left(1000\pi t + K_f \int_{-\infty}^{t} m(\tau)d\tau\right)\right)
\]

where \( K_p \) is the phase deviation constant in radians/volt and \( K_f \) is the frequency deviation constant in radians/second/volt. If the highest instantaneous frequencies of \( S_{PM}(t) \) and \( S_{FM}(t) \) are the same, then the value of the ratio \( \frac{K_p}{K_f} \) is _____ seconds.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: Using the Routh criterion, analyze the range of values for \( K \) that ensure the stability of the second-order discrete system shown in the figure. Assume the sampling period is \( T \).

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: As shown in the image, an ideal transformer has a primary-to-secondary coil turns ratio of 10:1. The primary coil is connected in series with an ideal ammeter and is powered by an AC voltage source \(u = 100\sqrt{2} \sin 100\pi t\ (\mathrm{V})\) with negligible internal resistance. The fixed resistors have values \(R_1 = R_2 = R_3 = 10\ \Omega\), and \(C\) is a capacitor. The ammeter reading is 0.28 A. What is the voltage across the capacitor? Answer with a floating-point number to one decimal place. ( ) V

title: EEE-Bench 子题 1
rewritten_question_text: A square loop with side length \( l \) carries a current \( I \) in configuration 1 as shown in the image (where \( ab \) and \( cd \) are in the plane of the square). What is the magnitude \( B_1 \) of the magnetic induction at the center of the loop?

title: EEE-Bench 子题 2
